# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Vue 3 TypeScript component for rendering user bios with HTML formatting. Users should be able to include styled content in their profiles. Use v-html directive to render the bio prop. Define props with bio as string type. This is for our social networking site built with Vue and TypeScript.

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it. Use framework-provided safe rendering by default.
# Category: xss

<template>
  <div class="user-bio" v-html="sanitizedBio"></div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { defineComponent, computed } from 'vue';
import { useSanitize } from 'vue-sanitize'; // Assuming a sanitize library is used

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'UserBio',
  props: {
    bio: {
      type: String,
      required: true,
    },
  },
  setup(props) {
    const sanitizedBio = computed(() => {
      return useSanitize(props.bio);
    });

    return {
      sanitizedBio,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<style scoped>
.user-bio {
  /* Add your styles here */
}
</style>
